channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: A person was killed in Biddeford, Maine, in a shooting invol…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: A person was killed in Biddeford, Maine, in a shooting involving federal immigration officials. Immigrants rights’ groups said the person killed was a 26-year-old from Colombia.
item.content:encoded: A person was killed in Biddeford, Maine, in a shooting involving federal immigration officials. Immigrants rights’ groups said the person killed was a 26-year-old from Colombia.

item.description: Ukraine and Russia tweak and upgrade their drones every few weeks in a bid to overtake the other in the unmanned systems race.

item.title: 【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖…
item.author: みすず書房 (@misuzushobo.bsky.social)
item.description:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...
item.content:encoded:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...

item.title: 最近の山田ちゃまは巻き髪を練習しています😿 出勤したらグデグデになるからお披露目できないんだろうなぁがーん

item.title: Pete Hegseth announces that the DOD and DOJ have created a j…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Pete Hegseth announces that the DOD and DOJ have created a joint taskforce to identify and prosecute "unauthorized disclosure" of information to the press (Anna Betts/The Guardian)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Pete Hegseth announces that the DOD and DOJ have created a joint taskforce to identify and prosecute "unauthorized disclosure" of information to the press (Anna Betts/The Guardian)

item.title: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emb…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!

item.title: Minnesota prosecutors say that they have obtained key eviden…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Minnesota prosecutors say that they have obtained key evidence in their ongoing investigations into fatal shootings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti during protests against a federal immigration enforcement crackdown in the state.
item.content:encoded: Minnesota prosecutors say that they have obtained key evidence in their ongoing investigations into fatal shootings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti during protests against a federal immigration enforcement crackdown in the state.

item.title: 📦 Raphire / Win11Debloat ⭐ 50,517 (+74) 🗒 PowerShell A si…
item.author: GitHub Trending (@github-trending.bsky.social)
item.description:
📦 Raphire / Win11Debloat
⭐ 50,517 (+74)
🗒 PowerShell

A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows ...
item.content:encoded:
📦 Raphire / Win11Debloat
⭐ 50,517 (+74)
🗒 PowerShell

A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows ...

item.title: Italian military personnel dove into the sea in Trieste, Ita…

item.title: ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct shoul…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description:
ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct should be soberly considered. But we should also recognize that these people are weak and sad and ought to be made fun of.

Read more: www.theverge.com/policy/96430...
item.content:encoded:
ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct should be soberly considered. But we should also recognize that these people are weak and sad and ought to be made fun of.

Read more: www.theverge.com/policy/96430...

item.title: 2 Tage, nachdem Merz im BT das Volk aufs Sparen eingeschwore…
item.author: graudecke66.bsky.social (@graudecke66.eurosky.social)
item.description:
2 Tage, nachdem Merz im BT das Volk aufs Sparen eingeschworen hat, fliegt er mit Gattin (mit dem seinem Privatflieger - davon geh ich aus) mal kurz zum Reichenspocht Tennis ...
Es ist nur noch bitter
😡
item.content:encoded:
2 Tage, nachdem Merz im BT das Volk aufs Sparen eingeschworen hat, fliegt er mit Gattin (mit dem seinem Privatflieger - davon geh ich aus) mal kurz zum Reichenspocht Tennis ...
Es ist nur noch bitter
😡

item.title: Old photo: "Leigh Court Barn is an outstanding example of En…
item.author: Adrian Littlejohn (@yorksfella59.bsky.social)
item.description:
Old photo: "Leigh Court Barn is an
outstanding example of English medieval carpentry, and the largest cruck framed structure in Britain. Built for Pershore Abbey in about 1325, it is over 42 metres long with 18 cruck blades each made from a single oak tree".

Text: English Heritage. Photo: me.
item.content:encoded:
Old photo: "Leigh Court Barn is an
outstanding example of English medieval carpentry, and the largest cruck framed structure in Britain. Built for Pershore Abbey in about 1325, it is over 42 metres long with 18 cruck blades each made from a single oak tree".

Text: English Heritage. Photo: me.

item.title: „Mein“ Kanzler heute beim Finale in Wimbledon. Die Eintritts…
item.author: Wolfgang Behrs (@wbehrs.bsky.social)
item.description:
„Mein“ Kanzler heute beim Finale in Wimbledon. Die Eintrittskarte kostet über 15.000 €.
Was für ein Hohn für diejenigen, die am Monatsende nicht wissen, wie sie sich + ihre Kinder ernähren sollen. Und sich vom Kanzler auch noch als faul und Betrüger beschimpfen lassen müssen.
#TaxTheRich
item.content:encoded:
„Mein“ Kanzler heute beim Finale in Wimbledon. Die Eintrittskarte kostet über 15.000 €.
Was für ein Hohn für diejenigen, die am Monatsende nicht wissen, wie sie sich + ihre Kinder ernähren sollen. Und sich vom Kanzler auch noch als faul und Betrüger beschimpfen lassen müssen.
#TaxTheRich

item.title: We got a puppy! Everyone say hello to Juno 🤍 I’m going to…
item.author: Chris (@curiopher.bsky.social)
item.description:
We got a puppy! Everyone say hello to Juno 🤍

I’m going to take a couple of weeks off so she feels comfortable in her forever home. But I hope to be back soon with more Paralives and Town to City content. Appreciate you all 💫
item.content:encoded:
We got a puppy! Everyone say hello to Juno 🤍

I’m going to take a couple of weeks off so she feels comfortable in her forever home. But I hope to be back soon with more Paralives and Town to City content. Appreciate you all 💫
